nodes.label: RiskEngineTest.kt
RiskEngineTest
.`assessRisk returns LOW when consistency is high and no overdue`()
.`assessRisk returns CRITICAL when consistency is very low with overdue and weak prereqs`()
.`assessRisk returns HIGH when consistency is below 0 dot 3`()
.`assessRisk returns HIGH when consistency is between 0 dot 3 and 0 dot 5 with overdue`()
.`assessRisk returns MEDIUM when consistency is between 0 dot 3 and 0 dot 5 without overdue`()
.`assessRisk returns MEDIUM when overdue exists even with good consistency`()
.`assessRisk returns MEDIUM when weak prerequisites exist with moderate consistency`()
.`overallRisk is CRITICAL when any subject is CRITICAL`()
.`overallRisk is CRITICAL when 2 or more subjects are HIGH`()
.`overallRisk is HIGH when one subject is HIGH`()
.`overallRisk is MEDIUM when 2 or more subjects are MEDIUM`()
.`riskFactors include CONSISTENCY_CRITICAL when consistency below 0 dot 3`()
.`riskFactors include CONSISTENCY_LOW when consistency between 0 dot 3 and 0 dot 5`()
.`riskFactors include OVERDUE_TASKS when overdue exists`()
.`riskFactors include WEAK_PREREQUISITES when weak prereqs exist`()
.`generateRiskFactors works standalone`()
.`handles empty subject list`()
.`uses default consistency of 1 dot 0 when not provided`()
